series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with the creation, performance, and administration of trust funds for the long-term treatment of water adversely affected by coal mining, and includes, but is not limited to: trust agreements, administrative orders, escrow agreements, financial and accounting calculations and records, evaluation and performance records, valuations, water monitoring data, maps, and funding and expenditures from the corpus.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records to be retained until five years after termination of the trust, then destroyed. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Electronic records retained until five years after termination of the trust, then deleted, except for the Post Mining Water Treatment Order and Agreement, including attachments thereto, and the final release records, which are retained permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
